PreToolUse.command: bash -c 'CMD=$(cat | jq -r ".tool_input.command // empty"); if echo "$CMD" | grep -q "git push"; then if git diff origin/main..HEAD --name-only -- web/ 2>/dev/null | grep -q .; then cd /c/Users/BJS/Desktop/projects/OTA/web && npm run build 1>&2 || { echo "Frontend build failed. Fix errors before pushing." 1>&2; exit 2; }; fi; fi'
